name: Chipotle Tomato Sauce (Capricorn)
recipeIngredient: Salt and black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the chipotle peppers: Wash, remove stems, slice, seed, and finely chop. Alternatively, use dried poblano peppers.
2. Cook and drain your choice of pasta in a large pot until al dente. Drain well.
3. In a medium skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add onion and cook until softened, about 2 minutes.
4. Add garlic, chipotle peppers, cumin, and oregano to the skillet. Cook for 1 minute.
5. Add chopped tomatoes (fresh or canned) and cook until they bubble vigorously, about 4 minutes.
6. Stir in tomato paste and sugar, then season with salt and pepper to taste. Cook for another 2 minutes.
7. Mix the cooked pasta with the sauce and cilantro. Serve immediately. Makes 4 servings.
